title: Kanecta State
description: Machine-local active selection (the HEAD analog), stored beside config.json as state.json. Mutable, machine-local, and gitignored — never config and never a source of truth. Records which working set and branch are active for the interactive/default context (Studio, a bare CLI). Per-consumer overrides — KANECTA_WORKING_SET / KANECTA_BRANCH and per-call arguments — sit above it, so concurrent consumers (e.g. MCP and the API) stay independent. Discovered at the same location as config.json (KANECTA_CONFIG, else the platform default), as a sibling state.json.

activeWorkingSet.description: Name of the active working set — a key in config.json 'workingSets'.

activeBranch.description: Active branch per working set, keyed by working-set name. Absent entries fall back to the working set's defaultBranch, then 'main'.
